title: Google Drive access blocked due to verification process
symptom: When attempting to connect Google Drive, the user receives an 'Access blocked: n8n.cloud has not completed the Google verification process' error message.
not_this_if: Google Drive connection works for other users
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application has not been verified by Google, which restricts access to certain users. This is common for applications in development mode that require user consent for access.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Navigate to the OAuth consent screen
Add your Gmail address as a test user
If necessary, click the 'Publish app' button to make it accessible
agent_instruction: Add your Gmail address as a test user in the Google Cloud Console for the n8n application.
